text.title: Solo Context Switch Output Contract
text.summary: JSON Schema for the daily block log artefact. Validator enforces the mode order, notification-silence flag, and handoff-note presence per block.

example.note: first_block_mode must be builder; Builder block notifications must be silenced; handoff_notes empty; high violations + urgency overrides need structural-fix action.

forbidden.pattern: block with handoff_note shorter than 20 chars (template not filled)

allowed-transformations.transformation: Compute first_block_mode from blocks[0].mode if omitted.
